GDP_U: Real GDP of Vietnam in constant prices base=2010 Source: GSO
CPI_U: Consumer Price Index All items with 2010=100. Sources: IMF IFS (PCPI_IX)
RS: Nominal Policy Rate (3-month interbank nominal rates monthly converted to quarterly)
GDP_RW: Real Gross Domestic Product (GDPC1) in billions of chain 2017 USD (https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/GDPC1)
CPI_RW: Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers: All Items in U.S. City Average (CPIAUCSL)
RS_RW: Market Yield on U.S. Treasury Securities at 3-Month Constant Maturity Quoted on an Investment Basis (GS3M)
